items.name: Vegetable Pakora

items.description: Marinated white fish in a crisp gram flour batter.

items.description: Marinated chicken in a crisp gram flour batter.

items.description: Spiced minced lamb, cooked in the tandoor.

items.name: Old School Lamb Curry
